final:
module mpc_controller (
    input wire clk,
    input wire reset,
    input wire [7:0] current_state,
    input wire [7:0] control_signal,
    output reg [7:0] next_state
);
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge reset or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (reset) begin
            next_state <= 8'b0;
        end else begin
            // Simple linear model: next_state = current_state + control_signal
            next_state <= current_state + control_signal;
        end
    end
endmodule
